articles.title: Search traffic has declined so much that some publishers are considering opting out of Google entirely
articles.summary: Back in 2024, Nilay Patel, editor-in-chief of The Verge, coined the term “Google Zero,” which he defined as “that moment when Google Search simply stops sending traffic outside of its search engine to third-party websites.” It increasingly feels as if that moment has arrived, and some publishers appear to be heading toward the decision that...

articles.title: Mobilizer, connector, spectator, or outsider? New Pew research categorizes how Americans do (or don’t) engage civically
articles.summary: Civic engagement takes many forms. The term describes activities as disparate as voting, volunteering, attending religious services, and following the news. Yet “these behaviors are often studied separately, making it difficult to see how they come together in people’s day-to-day lives,” researchers from the Pew-Knight Initiative write in a new report published Thursday. Their study,...

articles.title: “This price was set by an algorithm”: News subscribers are surprised by a new line in their renewal emails
articles.summary: Last December, one of our readers received a renewal email from The Wall Street Journal. Over the coming year, the email said, she would be charged $76.99 every four weeks for her print and digital subscription — $19.25 a week, or $923.88 annually. The renewal email included one sentence in all caps: “THIS PRICE WAS...

articles.title: 【元経産省の専門家に聞く】中小企業がハマる「生成AIトラブル」5つの解決シナリオ

articles.title: 4 paths to Frontier Transformation: From AI experimentation to real business value
articles.summary: AI is moving from experimentation to enterprise impact, with leading organizations focusing on four key paths to unlock business value across employees, customers, operations, and innovation. By embedding AI into workflows and aligning it to outcomes, these organizations are transforming how value is created and scaled. The post 4 paths to Frontier Transformation: From AI experimentation to real business value appeared first on The Microsoft Cloud Blog .
articles.content: AI is moving from experimentation to enterprise impact, with leading organizations focusing on four key paths to unlock business value across employees, customers, operations, and innovation. articles.title: How America’s newspapers lost their voice

articles.title: The World Cup of misinformation
articles.summary: One week into the FIFA World Cup, the Argentinian streaming channel Luzu TV was live on the air when host Florencia Peña falsely declared that Lionel Messi’s father, Jorge Messi, had died. Minutes later, Peña said nervously that producers had told her the information via her earpiece, but that she hadn’t seen it herself, that...

articles.title: 「スパイダーロボ」登場 がれきを走破、モノに「触って判断」も 災害現場で活用へ 国内ベンチャー
articles.summary: アトラックラボ（埼玉県入間郡）は、クモの形を模したロボットを開発したと発表した。実際のクモより2本少ない6本の脚を備えており、画像や触覚情報も処理できる。災害現場や危険区域などでの活用を目指す。
